<<network latency check>>

In C sharp we can measure time before sending data and after receiving response. This gives us time taken for data to travel to server and back. We can use stopwatch class to track time.

* * *

We can send data using udp client and wait for response. If no response is received we can assume packet was lost. We can calculate time difference between sending and receiving.

* * *

We can use try catch block to handle exceptions. We can log time taken for each packet. We can use book to store results. We can use book to store results.
